text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $64K with modest upside, while Ethereum has stalled at $1,679 with virtually no movement, suggesting a lack of conviction across the two largest assets. Extreme Fear sentiment (13) paired with rising BTC dominance (56.5%) indicates investors are rotating into Bitcoin as a perceived safe haven, though the $60B daily volume is relatively subdued for such risk-off conditions. The near-flat performance in most major alts alongside stalled ETH implies traders are either waiting on clarity or accumulating defensively rather than engaging in risk appetite.
